source_file: user-provided exercise library text and screenshots

fields.id: Stable identifier generated from body part, equipment, and source order.
fields.name_zh: Chinese exercise name from the source library.
fields.primary_muscles: Default inferred primary muscle group; refine when detailed anatomy is added.
fields.movement_pattern: Default inferred movement pattern for plan construction.
fields.goals: Default applicable goals; refine per exercise when needed.

exercises.notes: 从截图中清晰可读的动作名导入；解剖和目标为初步推断。
